details: The agent ran multiple kubectl commands against the cluster (get all, describe deployment, get rs, get events, describe pod) and correctly identified both required facts: (1) the rollout is stuck with Progressing=False / ProgressDeadlineExceeded, and (2) the root cause is the non-existent image nginx:2.0-does-not-exist causing ImagePullBackOff on the new replica set, while the old v1 pods (nginx:1.27-alpine) continue serving traffic. The diagnosis is complete, accurate, and fully supported by the command output.
